creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Konstantin Belousov from comment #4)

nss_ldap works fine without any recompilation after all files are installed (i.e. if it is removed form nsswitch.conf and then re added after freebsd-update install) so there seems to be something about the lack of atomicity in the update of the base system.  I'll see about building debug versions and also see if installworld has the same issues.
